nodes.norm_label: records the window and returns the temporally smoothed ema score.

nodes.norm_label: fuses the scores continuously for each window.     s_t = w_a*a_t + w_t*t_t + w_

nodes.label: If S_final > 0.7 -> Likely Scam     If 0.4 < S_final <= 0.7 -> Suspicious
nodes.norm_label: if s_final > 0.7 -> likely scam     if 0.4 < s_final <= 0.7 -> suspicious
